article.p: MetaOWL uses file-based routing. The directory structure in pages/ directly maps to URL routes.

h2.style: font-size: 1.5rem; font-weight: 600; color: var(--doc-heading-color); margin-top: 32px; margin-bottom: 16px;

article.p: Create pages in the src/pages/ directory:

pre.style: padding: 16px; border-radius: 8px; overflow-x: auto; font-size: 14px; margin-bottom: 24px;

h2.style: font-size: 1.5rem; font-weight: 600; color: var(--doc-heading-color); margin-top: 32px; margin-bottom: 16px;

article.p: For static pages, create a folder with an Index.js file:

h2.style: font-size: 1.5rem; font-weight: 600; color: var(--doc-heading-color); margin-top: 32px; margin-bottom: 16px;

article.p: Use square brackets to create dynamic route parameters:

pre.style: padding: 16px; border-radius: 8px; overflow-x: auto; font-size: 14px; margin-bottom: 16px;

article.p: Access the parameter inside your component via getCurrentRoute().params:

pre.style: padding: 16px; border-radius: 8px; overflow-x: auto; font-size: 14px; margin-bottom: 16px;

h2.style: font-size: 1.5rem; font-weight: 600; color: var(--doc-heading-color); margin-top: 32px; margin-bottom: 16px;

article.p: Use a [...param] directory to create a catch-all route that renders for any unmatched URL. This is how you implement a 404 page:

pre.style: padding: 16px; border-radius: 8px; overflow-x: auto; font-size: 14px; margin-bottom: 16px;
padding: 16px; border-radius: 8px; overflow-x: auto; font-size: 14px; margin-bottom: 24px;

article.p: The directory name can be anything starting with [... — e.g. [...path], [...404], [...slug]. If no catch-all route is defined, metaowl shows a built-in minimal 404 message instead of a blank or broken page.

h2.style: font-size: 1.5rem; font-weight: 600; color: var(--doc-heading-color); margin-top: 32px; margin-bottom: 16px;

pre.style: padding: 16px; border-radius: 8px; overflow-x: auto; font-size: 14px; margin-bottom: 24px;
pre.code:
import { router } from 'metaowl'
router.push('/about') router.replace('/login') router.back()

h2.style: font-size: 1.5rem; font-weight: 600; color: var(--doc-heading-color); margin-top: 32px; margin-bottom: 16px;

div.class: bg-gray-100 dark:bg-[#1e202e] border border-gray-300 dark:border-none rounded-lg p-6 mb-8
div.p: Click the buttons to try out the navigation.

input.class: w-full px-3 py-2 border border-gray-300 dark:border-gray-700 rounded-md bg-white dark:bg-gray-800 text-gray-900 dark:text-gray-100 text-sm

button.class: px-4 py-2 bg-blue-500 text-white border-none rounded-md cursor-pointer text-sm font-medium hover:bg-blue-600 transition-colors
px-4 py-2 bg-violet-500 text-white border-none rounded-md cursor-pointer text-sm font-medium hover:bg-violet-600 transition-colors
px-4 py-2 bg-gray-500 text-white border-none rounded-md cursor-pointer text-sm font-medium hover:bg-gray-600 transition-colors
